title: Everlasto 'Everstrong' Premium Quality Steel Core PVC Clothesline Washing Line 4.7mm x 20M
features: PREMIUM - A high quality plastic clothes line that will gives years of service.
THICK - At 4.7mm, the thickest steel core line on the market, holds pegs well.
STRONG - Made with a 7 strand cabled steel core for strength. This line will not sag.
DURABLE - Has a wipe clean, weatherpoof PVC outer for durability. A wipe with a damp cloth will have the line looking good as new!

PRACTICAL - Comes with two line tensioners to easily tighten the line at both ends. Simply feed through the tensioner and around a fixing point and back onto the tensioner. Once the line is loaded simply slide the tensioners along the line to add tension.
description: Product Description Ropes • Twisted and braided. • Natural and synthetic. • Strong and hard wearing. • For industrial, leisure and decorative applications. Twines • Extensive range. • Natural and synthetic. • Durable and hard wearing. • For a range of practical and craft applications. Cords • From sash cords to bungee cords. • Natural and synthetic. • Durable and hard wearing. • For a range of leisure, trade and DIY applications . Lines • Huge range. • From clothes lines to pulley lines. • Natural and synthetic. • Durable and hard wearing.
